sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Critical equipment malfunction. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.
Population: 25. Critical equipment malfunction. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Vulcan-23.
Population: 25. Critical equipment malfunction. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Selene-1.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 46): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
